_meta.notes: Updated in iter-017 M7a-2: added G-AIBATTLE-DEDUP (processAI inline battle resolve duplicates formulas.aiBattleResolve; dedup deferred to M9). Updated in iter-016 M7a-1: added G-WORLD-PERSIST-DERIVED (goldDemand/goldProduction persist deviation from design §8). Updated in iter-014 M5-2: added contract gaps (G-CONTRACTS-CATALOG, G-CONTRACT-GEN, G-CONTRACT-SCHED-CLEANUP, G-BUILD-CANCEL). Summary recomputed from actual gaps array. Updated in iter-013 M5-1: added M5-1 gaps for buildings/builder/cost/resistance/space/unlock/mulstack/techbonus/repair. G-LISTBUILDINGS status updated (resolved in M5-1). G-BUILDER-M5 resolved (buildings system live). Previous update: iter-009 M3 added M3 gaps for production/jobs/skills/forest/field/mine.

gaps.description: Full building list (listBuildings.json) not found in extracted sources; only 4 buildings reconstructed from config.js references. M5-1: 6 approximated buildings delivered in buildings.json (well, farm, mine, builderHut, warehouse, workshop). Real list calibration M9.

build command calls pay() without ctx — tx audit log entry (emitTx) is skipped. Gold IS correctly deducted; only the audit trail is missing. Intentional gap per design §2.1 / M5-D11 (arch iter-002: dispatch.js calls handler(state,params), not handler(state,params,ctx)). Deferred to M5-2/M9 when ctx/audit layer is introduced.

costScaleFactor (BALANCE.buildings.costScaleFactor) is approximated; real cost curve not extracted from original sources. scaleCostByCount formula: cost = baseCost * scaleFactor^totalMade. Calibration deferred to M9.

maxActiveProjects and maxProjectQueue per builderHut (effects[]) are approximated values (perHut=2 and perHut=3 respectively). Real values not extracted from original home.js sources. Also: effectFromCatalog is a permanent helper for these attrs (not aggregated into home.derived); a future design may unify via modifier fold if top-level base fields are added to catalog.

Company masonProvided bonus to maxActiveProjects is live (companies.json, buyCompany.js, getMasonProvided). Exact per-company masonProvided values are approximated; real original calibration unknown. Calibration M9.
building.resistance (HP restored per repair project) is approximated per building type. Real resistance values not extractable from original sources. Calibration M9.
Space gate (spaceType/spaceAvailable) skipped in M5-1; all buildings are considered placeable. Validation TODO M5-2: spaceAvailable(spaceType) >= effective(itemId, spaceType).
Unlock gate (building.unlocked) defaults to true for all buildings in M5-1; tech-gated unlock system deferred to M6 when tech tree (G-LISTTECHS) is implemented.

Multi-instance stacking of building effects (created > 1 handled via addBuildingModifiers value = atom.value * created for op:add) is live in M5-1. Edge case: if a building type has two add atoms on the same attr, duplicate modifier ids cause double-counting (NIT-2 in review REVIEW-013-009). Not triggered by current buildings.json data; latent risk for future catalog additions.

Tech bonuses to building output/capacity (e.g. forester tech mods, future production multipliers) are not wired to the modifier system in M5-1. Modifier fold infrastructure is in place; tech sources deferred to M6.

Repair project: deferred payment (project.paid=false until canAfford) is live. Recycling/refund on cancelled repair is not implemented in M5-1 (cancel not exposed as command). Deferred to M5-2/M9 with build cancel/audit layer.
listGoods.json not found in extracted sources; goods catalog is empty
basePrice is randomized at runtime; no static baseline extractable from sources
listJob.json not found; 7 jobs + builder stub reconstructed from home.js/config.js; exact maxStep/products are approximated (default maxStep=0.005, gap G-JOB-MAXSTEP). Real calibration M9.
listTechs.json not found in extracted sources; tech tree is empty skeleton
listZone.json not found; zones catalog is empty skeleton
listSkill.json not found; 2 approximated example skills added (woodworking, scholarship) for M3 system testing. Real skill list is M6.
Discrepancy: spoilage.cheese=0.08 in active config but baseSpoilage.cheese=0.10 in base config; may indicate a bug in the original

Exact job.maxStep and job.products quantities not extractable from listJob.json (missing). Default 0.005 approximated: completionUnits=maxStep*900*number; at eff=1 number=10 → 4 quarterDay/day × 10 = 40 curStep/day; completion in ~1.1 days. Real calibration M9.
Forester building, pollination service, animalGrowth tech bonuses omitted from forestRegen (forest.js:69,92,144). These modify tree/animal growth rates.
vegetableFarm.created=0 (no buildings in M3) → chanceOfRodents=0 → rodent mechanika fakticky vypnuta. Mechanika připravena, aktivuje se přidáním budov v M5.
eventMineExpander (mine.js) is a content event (M8). In M3 the trigger fires (RNG consumed) but the effect is a no-op with log entry.

builder job slot is a stub (noProduction=true). Building construction mechanics are M5. RESOLVED in iter-013 M5-1: buildersProcess, build command, completeBuild, applyRepair all live. Builder number drives construction speed. Company firm capacity (masonProvided) live via buyCompany.
Original home.js distributes work into sub-tasks randomly. M3 uses worker number directly (no sub-task distribution). Gap: G-JOB-TASKS M5.
population.total vs workerSlots sjednocení: M3 uses min(population.total, workerSlots) as available workers. Exact mapping (M5 labor market) deferred.
Original home.level (0..6 progression) mapped to settlementLevel proxy in M3. Area formulas (forest/field/mine) use settlementLevel as proxy. Precise mapping in M5.
workerEfficiency morale components (minWorkerPenalty, leaderMorality, entertainmentOffset, goodSpiritsBonus, workerMorale) all = 0 in M3 → workerEfficiency = constant 1. Full morale system M5.

2× step compensation for skills (stepCompensation=0.5, effMaxStep=maxStep/2). Architecture §4.3/§5.5 (K4) documents this. M9 calibration will finalize whether maxStep or maxStep/2 is the correct balance.
Skill onFull/onStart effects registry (skills.js:18) not implemented in M3. Only products are granted on completion. Full effects system M6.
Skill discovery (sector/tech prerequisites) not implemented in M3. All skills in catalog are discoverable by default. Full discovery system M6.

Contract catalog implements minimal playable set (goodsSeller/goodsBuyer). Remaining original types (ximniTrader/marbleSeller/mercenary/houseBuilder/mineBuilder) depend on M6/M7 systems. Derived from events.js. Calibration M9.
Contract generation cadence/selection (which types offered, frequency) approximated via schedule period + isolated rng stream. Original tuning calibrated in M9.
Stale contract schedule events (offer/expire) are not proactively garbage-collected when a contract leaves the queue; expire handler is idempotent no-op. Cleanup optimization deferred.
Cancelling an in-progress build/project (refund partial cost) not implemented in M5. Build UI has no cancel action. Deferred to later polish.

goldDemand/goldProduction are classified as derived (re-derivable) in design §8, but are persisted in persistSchema.js to ensure fresh-vs-load hashState identity (M-2 hash stability). Pre-policy snapshot values must be present in both create and load paths for determinism; recalculating them identically on both paths without persisting would add complexity. Intentional deviation, low risk. Revisit during M9 persist audit to evaluate whether a shared re-derivation path can replace the persist.

processAI inline battle resolve (world.js:1096-1132, state 6) duplicates formulas.aiBattleResolve (formulas.js:380-429). formulas.aiBattleResolve is called only from tests; production processAI uses an inline copy. Both are 1:1 identical to the original (warrResults/archResults formula + win/loss branches). Risk: dual maintenance point — divergence on M9 balance calibration. NErefaktorovat (determinismus-citlivý processAI). Sjednotit v M9 cleanup.
